iree_add_all_subdirs()

iree_py_library(
  NAME
    check
  SRCS
    "__init__.py"
    "annotations.py"
    "cases.py"
    "import_test.py"
    "loom_verifier.py"
    "main.py"
    "python.py"
    "registry.py"
    "results.py"
    "updates.py"

    loom::py::loom::package
    loom::py::loom::tools::loom_opt
)

set(_loom_import_check_python_deps "")
if(LOOM_IMPORT_MLIR)
  list(APPEND _loom_import_check_python_deps loom::py::loom::importers::mlir::mlir_packages)
endif()
if(LOOM_IMPORT_TILELANG)
  list(APPEND _loom_import_check_python_deps loom::py::loom::importers::tilelang::tilelang_packages)
endif()
iree_py_library(
  NAME
    loom_import_check
  MAIN
    "__main__.py"
  SRCS
    "__main__.py"
  DEPS
    loom::py::loom::importers::check::check
    loom::py::loom::importers::check::mlir::mlir
    loom::py::loom::importers::check::tilelang::tilelang
    ${_loom_import_check_python_deps}
)

iree_py_test(
  NAME
    check_test
  SRCS
    "../../tools/pytest_style_runner.py"
  ARGS
    "loom.importers.check.annotations_test"
    "loom.importers.check.cases_test"

    "loom.importers.check.results_test"

  DEPS
    loom::py::loom::importers::check::check

    "${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/loom/py"

)
